mapper.sql: id, subject_id, question_type, title, options_json, answer_json, analysis, score, difficulty, knowledge_point, creator_id, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: select from question where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into question(subject_id, question_type, title, options_json, answer_json, analysis, score, difficulty, knowledge_point, creator_id, create_time, update_time, deleted) values (#{subjectId}, #{questionType}, #{title}, #{optionsJson}, #{answerJson}, #{analysis}, #{score}, #{difficulty}, #{knowledgePoint}, #{creatorId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: update question set subject_id = #{subjectId}, question_type = #{questionType}, title = #{title}, options_json = #{optionsJson}, answer_json = #{answerJson}, analysis = #{analysis}, score = #{score}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, knowledge_point = #{knowledgePoint}, creator_id = #{creatorId}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update question set deleted = 1, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select from question where deleted = 0 and id in
#{id}

select q.id, q.subject_id, q.question_type, q.title, q.options_json, q.answer_json, q.analysis, q.score, q.difficulty, q.knowledge_point, q.creator_id, q.create_time, q.update_time, q.deleted, sa.answer_content as student_answer_content, sa.question_score, sa.actual_score, sa.submit_time from question q inner join student_answer sa on q.id = sa.question_id and sa.deleted = 0 where q.deleted = 0 and sa.student_id = #{studentId} and ( (ifnull(sa.objective_flag, 0) = 1 and ifnull(sa.correct_flag, 0) = 0) or ( ifnull(sa.objective_flag, 0) = 0 and sa.marking_status = 'MARKED' and ifnull(sa.actual_score, 0) < ifnull(sa.question_score, 0) ) ) and not exists ( select 1 from student_answer latest_sa where latest_sa.deleted = 0 and latest_sa.student_id = sa.student_id and latest_sa.question_id = sa.question_id and ( (ifnull(latest_sa.objective_flag, 0) = 1 and ifnull(latest_sa.correct_flag, 0) = 0) or ( ifnull(latest_sa.objective_flag, 0) = 0 and latest_sa.marking_status = 'MARKED' and ifnull(latest_sa.actual_score, 0) < ifnull(latest_sa.question_score, 0) ) ) and ( coalesce(latest_sa.submit_time, latest_sa.update_time, latest_sa.create_time) > coalesce(sa.submit_time, sa.update_time, sa.create_time) or ( coalesce(latest_sa.submit_time, latest_sa.update_time, latest_sa.create_time) = coalesce(sa.submit_time, sa.update_time, sa.create_time) and latest_sa.id > sa.id ) ) ) order by coalesce(sa.submit_time, sa.update_time, sa.create_time) desc, q.id desc
